top_signals.title: Singapore reports lower-than-expected inflation for April at 1.8%, revises economic growth higher
top_signals.summary: Core inflation — which strips out prices of private transport and accommodation —  came in at 1.4%, against estimates of 1.7%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Nidec boss hints at more M&A deals once scandals abate
top_signals.summary: CEO Mitsuya Kishida has underlined regaining trust as the Kyoto-based electric motor manufacturer's top priority.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
